TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit HBColor extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor>

Docs.summary: Represents a HarfBuzz color value with BGRA byte ordering.

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(unsigned int32 value) cil managed

Docs.param: The raw 32-bit color value in BGRA byte order (0xBBGGRRAA).

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(unsigned int8 red, unsigned int8 green, unsigned int8 blue, unsigned int8 alpha) cil managed

Docs.param: The alpha channel value (0–255), where 0 is fully transparent and 255 is fully opaque.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from individual color channel values.

MemberSignature.Value: public byte Alpha { get; }
.property instance unsigned int8 Alpha

Docs.value: The alpha component in the range 0–255, where 0 is fully transparent and 255 is fully opaque.
